title: SSH connection failure in n8n
symptom: When attempting to use the SSH node to connect to localhost, n8n returns 'Couldn’t connect with these settings'. The connection fails despite successful SSH access from the server itself.
not_this_if: SSH connection works from the command line
root_cause: When n8n is running in a Docker container, it may not be able to connect to the host machine using localhost or 127.0.0.1. Instead, it requires the correct IP address of the Docker host or specific configurations to access services running on the host.
fix_steps: Identify the correct IP address to use for the SSH connection, such as the Docker interface IP or the host's IP.
Ensure that the SSH service on the host is configured to listen on the chosen IP address or on 0.0.0.0.
Check for any firewall rules that may be blocking the connection.
agent_instruction: Use the correct IP address for the SSH connection and ensure the SSH service is properly configured.
